prompt:
Use the repo-local skill at /Users/benlao/Downloads/STANFORD_20260201/skills/crypto-token-review.

Review one company from the crypto company queue.

Allowed sources only:
- official website under the official domain
- CoinGecko
- CoinMarketCap

Do not use:
- DefiLlama
- GeckoTerminal
- DexScreener
- news sites
- third-party media
- forums
- social media
- any other websites

Task scope:
- decide `has_token`
- fill `token_ticker` only if supported
- provide short evidence text
- provide evidence URLs
- provide evidence source types
- provide confidence
- provide `needs_manual_review`

Decision rules:
- `yes` requires positive evidence from the allowed sources
- `no` requires an explicit official statement that there is no native token or no token design
- no evidence is not `no`
- unresolved cases must be `unknown`
- exchange status does not imply a token
- if sources conflict, prefer the official site; otherwise mark `needs_manual_review = yes`
- do not deep-search listing data unless it is already explicit on the allowed sources

CompanyID: 103700-62
CompanyName: Zebpay
Website: www.zebpay.com
normalized_domain: zebpay.com
Verticals: Cryptocurrency/Blockchain, FinTech

Keywords: bitcoin exchange, bitcoin exchange service, bitcoin trading platform, cryptocurrency exchange, cryptocurrency trading, decentralized marketplace, decentralized platform
MatchedKeywords: crypto|blockchain
MatchedColumns: Verticals|Description|Keywords|Relation_Verticals
